patch.value: CONTEXT: npm requires semver; pm uses a date scheme. DECISION: version is YYYY.M.D (unpadded) for the first release of a UTC day and YYYY.M.D-N for same-day follow-ups; package.json version is NEVER hand-edited (only the release pipeline sets it); auto-release runs daily ~02:35 UTC and skips when only tracker-only commits exist; same-day releases are manual workflow_dispatch only. CONSEQUENCES: release cadence visible from the version; no semver-breakage signal; a hard 'never touch package.json version' invariant; format enforced by version:check. EVIDENCE: docs/RELEASING.md, .github/workflows/auto-release.yml; items pm-ot8r/pm-qa2h; memory project_session_2026_05_28_release_unblock.
ADR: Date-based calendar versioning with daily automated release and manual same-day follow-ups
Date-based calendar versioning with daily automated release and manual same-day follow-ups
ADR recorded and accepted; architectural decision documented as durable context on 2026-05-31.
Accepted ADR recorded in living map
